homeHero.headline: Engineered Without Compromise.
homeHero.subheadline: Ultralight precision rifles built for hard country and long shots. Every component selected. Every ounce justified. Every rifle guaranteed.

docxCopy.brandStatement: BADWRX builds precision rifles for hunters and shooters who refuse to accept average. We start with the finest components available, engineer them to work together as a system, and deliver a rifle that performs at the limits of what is possible. Light enough to carry 40 miles into the mountains. Accurate enough to deliver precision when you get there.

pillars.weight: WEIGHT — Every gram is a decision. We build ultralight without sacrificing the structural integrity and mechanical precision that long-range accuracy demands.
pillars.accuracy: ACCURACY — Sub-MOA performance is the floor, not the ceiling. Our rifles are built, tested, and guaranteed to shoot ½ MOA with proper load development.
pillars.durability: DURABILITY — Hard country breaks equipment. BADWRX rifles are built for conditions that end hunts — and built to deliver on target every time.

buildsPage.headline: Six Platforms. One Standard.
buildsPage.subcopy: Every BADWRX rifle is built to order on your timeline, to your specifications, in the caliber you need. Select a platform below to view full specifications, available calibers, and configuration options. When you are ready, request a build quote and we will get to work.

docxCopy.customQuoteCta:
Every BADWRX rifle is built to order. No inventory. No compromises. Tell us what you need.
[CTA Button: Request a Build Quote]
docxCopy.packageCta: The Complete System. Every BADWRX build is available with the BADWRX Basecamp Package — a laser-cut BADWRX hard case, Garmin Xero Chronograph, and Fix It Sticks field tool kit. Everything you need from the bench to the backcountry.
docxCopy.rifleLineupPreview:
Six purpose-built platforms. One standard.
[Display rifle cards: Specter / Reaper / Imperium / Invictus / Sentinel / G.O.A.T. — each with photo, one-line description, and View Build button]

contactPage.headline: Start Your Build.
contactPage.intro: Every BADWRX rifle is built to order. Fill out the form below with your build details and we will be in touch within [X] business days to discuss your configuration, timeline, and pricing. There are no stock rifles. There are no shortcuts. There is just your rifle, built right.
contactPage.expectations: What happens next: We review every build request personally. You will receive a response from us directly — not a form email — within [X] business days. We will confirm your configuration, discuss lead time, and provide a build quote. We do not take deposits until we are both confident in the build.

rifles.title: BADWRX Specter
rifles.tagline: The folder. Disappears into your pack.

rifles.title: BADWRX Invictus
rifles.tagline: Built to BADWRX standards. No exceptions.

rifles.title: BADWRX Sentinel
rifles.tagline: Built for when reliability is not optional.

specter.tagline: The folder. Disappears into your pack. Reappears when it counts.
specter.calibers: 6.5 Creedmoor · 6.5 PRC · 7 PRC · 300 PRC · Additional calibers on request
specter.description: The BADWRX Specter is built around one mission — getting a precision rifle deep into backcountry without paying for it in weight or performance. The MDT HNT 26 folding chassis collapses the overall length for bush planes, pack frames, and tight quarters, then locks into a consistent shooting position every time it deploys. The BADWRX Primus action delivers sub-MOA precision in a platform engineered for the mountains. The ultralight carbon wrapped barrel delivers bullets on target every time. Every component on the Specter was selected for the hunter who measures approach distances in miles and elevation in vertical feet. This is the ultralight folding precision rifle.

reaper.calibers: 6.5 Creedmoor · 6.5 PRC · 7 PRC · 300 PRC · Additional calibers on request
reaper.description: The BADWRX Reaper is our full chassis platform — purpose built for the shooter who demands complete adjustability without sacrificing precision or field reliability. Built on the BADWRX Primus action and housed in the MDT HNT 26 chassis, the Reaper delivers a repeatable cheek weld, folding capability, and a rigid bedding platform that performs identically from the bench to the field. Carbon wrapped barrel keeps weight where it belongs. This is a working rifle built for serious use.

imperium.calibers: 6.5 Creedmoor · 6.5 PRC · 7 PRC · 300 PRC · Additional calibers on request
imperium.description: The BADWRX Imperium pairs the Primus action with the Manners Pro Hunter Adjustable stock for a mountain hunting platform built for the hunter who wants adjustability without the folding mechanism. The Pro Hunter delivers a consistent cheek weld, length of pull adjustment, and the legendary Manners fit and finish in a package optimized for day-long carries in vertical terrain. Hawkins M5 bottom metal. Same action, barrel, trigger, brake, and glass as the Specter — at a lower price point. The Imperium is for the hunter who knows exactly what they need.

invictus.tagline: Built to BADWRX standards. No exceptions.
invictus.calibers: 6.5 Creedmoor · 6.5 PRC · 7 PRC · 300 PRC · Additional calibers on request
invictus.description: The BADWRX Invictus is the entry point into the BADWRX system — built on the Invictus X action with a carbon wrapped barrel, AG Composites stock, and TriggerTech Special trigger. It is not a budget rifle. It is a precision instrument built to the same tolerances and standards as every other BADWRX build, on a platform that has proven itself in every condition imaginable. If you are stepping into precision rifle shooting or looking for a capable hunting rifle without the ultralight premium, the Invictus is your rifle.

sentinel.tagline: Built for when reliability is not optional.
sentinel.calibers: 300 PRC · 375 Ruger · 375 H&H · Additional calibers on request
sentinel.description: The BADWRX Sentinel is built for guides, outfitters, and hunters who operate in country where the rifle has to work — every time, without question, under any condition. Controlled Round Feed action ensures positive extraction in environments that challenge push-feed designs. Short carbon wrapped barrel keeps handling fast and overall length manageable in dense terrain and close quarters. The Sentinel is chambered in calibers chosen for authority at both long range and bad breath distance. This is the rifle for when the job is non-negotiable.

goat.description: The BADWRX G.O.A.T. is built for the shooter who demands titanium-grade performance in the most compact and capable package we have ever offered. A 16.5 inch Carbon Six barrel in 7mm Backcountry delivers velocity and terminal performance that defies its length. The Lone Peak Fuzion Ti titanium action keeps weight at an absolute minimum while delivering the precision and reliability the BADWRX name demands. The XLR ATOM chassis folds tight for transport and locks rigid for the shot. This is the rifle for the hunter who has done the miles and knows exactly what they need when they get there.

copyBlocks.BASECAMP PACKAGE — Body: Every BADWRX rifle is built to perform. The BADWRX Basecamp Package ensures it is protected, verified, and maintainable everywhere you take it. Available on all six BADWRX platforms, the Basecamp Package includes a laser-cut BADWRX hard case foam insert fitted precisely to your rifle configuration, a Garmin Xero Chronograph for verified ballistic data in the field, and a Fix It Sticks field tool kit with the tools you need to maintain your rifle anywhere on earth. This is not a bundle. It is a system.
copyBlocks.BASECAMP — Laser-Cut Hard Case: Custom laser-cut foam insert fitted to the exact dimensions of your rifle, scope, and accessories. Your rifle sits exactly where it belongs. Nothing moves.
copyBlocks.BASECAMP — Garmin Xero Chronograph: Wireless, compact, accurate. Know your actual velocity in any condition. Not what a chart says — what your rifle says.
copyBlocks.BASECAMP — Fix It Sticks Field Kit: The torque driver system used by professional gunsmiths and field hunters worldwide. The tools you need to maintain zero, tighten components, and solve problems in the field.
copyBlocks.OPTICS PACKAGE — Body: Every BADWRX rifle is built to work with the glass you choose. The BADWRX Optics Package pairs your rifle with Nightforce optics and Hawkins Precision rings — the same combination we trust on every build we run ourselves. Contact us to discuss your specific optic configuration. We will match the right glass to your platform, your caliber, and your intended use.
copyBlocks.HAWKINS RINGS — Description: Hawkins Precision Ultra Light Tactical Rings — 30mm with offset level cap. The standard for precision rifle builds. Hawkins rings hold zero, protect your turrets, and add virtually nothing to your overall weight.
copyBlocks.BALLISTIC PACKAGE — Headline: Your rifle ships zeroed. Most builders stop there. We don't.
copyBlocks.BALLISTIC PACKAGE — Body: The BADWRX Ballistic Package takes your rifle to 1,000 meters. We shoot it, collect real velocity data, build your ballistic solution, true the data against actual impacts, calculate density altitude and firing solution corrections, and laser engrave your custom turret with the drop data for your exact load. Tell us where you hunt and what time of year — we account for the atmospherics. When your rifle arrives, your turrets are engraved for your elevation, your conditions, and your load. You dial, you shoot, you connect. This is not a ballistic app. This is your rifle, your data, your turrets — done right before it ever leaves our hands.
copyBlocks.BALLISTIC PACKAGE — How It Works: When you order the Ballistic Package, tell us where you are hunting and what time of year. We use that information to set atmospheric parameters that match your conditions. Your rifle is shot at distance, the data is collected and trued, corrections are applied, and your turrets are engraved before the rifle ships. You arrive in the field with a rifle that is ready.
copyBlocks.ABOUT — Body: BADWRX was built on a simple conviction — that a precision rifle should do exactly what it is designed to do, weigh exactly what it needs to weigh, and perform without fail in the conditions that matter. We are not a production company. We do not build rifles in volume and hope they perform. Every BADWRX rifle is built to order, assembled by hand, and tested before it leaves. We select components that earn their place on the rifle. If something does not make the rifle lighter, more accurate, or more reliable — it does not go on the rifle. Our customers are serious hunters and precision shooters who have done their research and know exactly what they need. They are not looking for a name. They are looking for a rifle that works. We build that rifle. BADWRX. Diamondhead, Mississippi.
copyBlocks.ABOUT — Pillar 1: PRECISION: We build to tolerances that matter. Every action, barrel, and component in a BADWRX rifle is selected and fitted to perform as a system, not as a collection of parts.
copyBlocks.ABOUT — Pillar 2: WEIGHT: Ultralight is not a marketing term. It is an engineering discipline. We build the lightest rifle that can do the job — and we do not build rifles that cannot.
copyBlocks.ABOUT — Pillar 3: RELIABILITY: A precision rifle that fails in the field is worse than useless. Every BADWRX build is tested, verified, and guaranteed before it ships.

rings.label: Hawkins Precision ULT Rings — 30mm

items: Laser-Cut BADWRX Hard Case — Custom laser-cut foam insert fitted to your exact rifle config
Garmin Xero Chronograph — Wireless, compact, accurate velocity measurement

deliverables: Live Fire to 1,000m — Real impacts, real data — not a calculator estimate
Velocity Data Collection — Correct for actual muzzle velocity, not the box
Ballistic Solution Build — Complete solution for your load, rifle, and barrel
DSF / Density Alt. Corrections — Corrected for your hunt location and season
Custom Laser Engraved Turrets — Drop data engraved on your scope turrets — no cards, no guessing
